description: A former customer is targeted with a special 'win-back' offer to rejoin.

nodes.task_description: Identify the former customer in the marketing database and verify the win-back offer details.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent confirms the customer is eligible for '50% off for 6 months'.

nodes.task_description: Create a new account for the customer, applying the special win-back promotion.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully creates a new account with the promotional code applied.
